title: This Is Shadowverse!!
overview: Hiro is ready to play the coolest game around, Shadowverse. But when a bad guy steals his friend's phone, he'll have to endure a trial by fire if he wants to get it back!

title: Hiro's Resolve
overview: To get his friend's phone back, Hiro will have to challenge the toughest Shadowverse battler around: Luca Yonazuki.

title: The Plot of the Genius Among Geniuses
overview: Hiro is challenged by an amazing new foe, the "genius among geniuses!" Can he stand against this intellectual onslaught?

title: Something Special
overview: Mimori wants to be someone special... like her favorite idol, Alice Kurobane. She meets a girl who offers to introduce her to Alice... if she can beat her in Shadowverse first!

title: Fierce Battle! Hiro vs. Kazuki!
overview: Kazuki and Hiro face off at a local tournament, with an exciting prize on the line!

title: The Reason for Strength
overview: Kai is interested in the secret of Luca Yonazuki's strength. But Luca only cares about one thing...

title: Aim for Master Rank!
overview: The National tournament is here, but if Hiro wants to enter, he'll need to get to Master Rank, and he'll need to do it in a single day!

title: The National Tournament Finals Begin!
overview: The final rounds of the National Tournament have begun, and to make his way up the ranks, Hiro will first need to defeat the mysterious Elica!

title: The Curtain Rises! A Beautiful Witch Show!
overview: Hiro moves on to the second battle. His next opponent is Seiya, a powerful pro player!

title: Mauro's Spellcasting!
overview: Hiro challenges the mysterious Maura to progress in the finals! Maura has plenty of tricks up his sleeve!

title: Hiro vs Luca
overview: It's time to face off against Luca for the national championship! But he's no easy foe!

title: Who Will Claim Victory?
overview: The battle against Luca draws to a close! What drives him, and why does he play Shadowverse when he hates it?

title: The Shadow Grand Prix Begins
overview: The nationals were just the beginning, it's time to challenge the whole world! The Shadow Gran Prix begins!

title: A Mouthwatering Battle! Marcel Tabeoka!
overview: It's a mouth-watering battle as Hiro challenges a famous chef for his first match in the Shadow Gran Prix!

title: Super Rich! Miyabi Zaizenji!
overview:
Hiro fights the incredibly rich, and incredibly bratty, Miyabi Zaizenji!

Is money enough to win at Shadowverse?

title: An Invitation to the Underworld! The Joubert Sisters!
overview: Alice and Minori team up for their first tag battle! But their opponents won't go easy on them!

title: Special and Ordinary
overview: Mimori and Alice face off! Is it better to be special, or normal?

title: A Terrible Trap! Zuo and Ko
overview: Kai and Kazuki battle the crazy hunters Zuo and Ko in a battle of wits and courage against tag battle mastery!

title: Bearers of Shadow
overview: A new force has joined the Gran Prix, the mysterious Shadow Knights! These bearers of shadow will stop at nothing to take out the competitors!

title: A Smile That's Black
overview: Mauro challenges Hiro to a rematch. If he wins, Hiro will learn the truth about the Shadow Gran Prix.

title: Battle of Destiny
overview: Hiro heads for the central tower to unlock the mysteries of the Gran Prix. Barring his way is Luca, who's ready for another confrontation.

title: Conclusion, and...
overview: Hiro and Luca finish their battle. Can Hiro open a path to Luca's heart?

title: Unknown Encounter
overview: The true nature of Shadowverse is revealed, as Hiro and his friends begin their ultimate test.

title: Blessings and Woe
overview: Hiro is forced to battle the 8th class, Portalcraft!

title: Seven Hopes
overview: Having proved themselves worthy to battle the Tree of Woe, the team heads out into a shattered world to find the 7 legendary cards.

title: Grab the Legend
overview: Hiro fights a deadly duel against a pro player... to win the first legendary card!

title: The Ultimate Dragon
overview: If he wants to beat Shiro, Hiro's going to need some help. He'll need the first legendary card: the awesome Infiniflame Dragon!

title: Overlapping Answers!
overview: Kai and Alice battle the bounty hunter sisters for the rights to their own legendary cards.

title: Proof That I Am Me
overview: Luca tracks down his opponent: his own sister. If he wants to get the legendary card, he'll have to see the truth behind her fake smile...

title: Resolve and Courage
overview: Mimori is locked in a tough battle with a possessed Seiya. She can't win on her own, but a familiar face has a score to settle with the pro player...

title: Hero's Blade
overview: Kazuki is on the verge of losing to the duo of Zuo and Ko. But he'll never give up, no matter how bad it gets!

title: Footsteps of Hope
overview: Mauro suddenly challenges Luca to a battle without warning. What secrets is he hiding in his heart?

title: Fate of Destruction
overview: Mauro is possessed by a huge number of Empty Shadows. They twist his mind, causing him to became an enemy of mankind. Hiro and Luca fight to bring him back.

title: Battle of Despair
overview: Mauro's 3 divine instruments are too much for Hiro and Luca, and they're losing the battle. But still, Mauro is a friend, and a comrade. They'll bring him back no matter what it takes!

title: Prelude to the End
overview: Hiro finds himself meeting an unexpected person: his missing father. Now his father is on the side of the enemy!

title: A Heart That Believes
overview: Hiro's battle with his father reaches its climatic end, with the fate of the world in the balance.

title: A Voice That Calls to Awaken
overview: Hiro battles Rowen in this new, strange world. But Rowen's deck is a dragonslayer deck, which can insta-kill any dragon. How can Hiro's dragons defeat it?

title: Hiro and the Black Dragon Knight
overview: Hiiro battles the black dragon knight! But the knight's deck is full of dragonslayer cards, and Hiro's deck is a dragon deck!

title: Mimori's an Idol
overview: Mimori's the hottest idol around! But what good is it to be an idol in a world that's fake?

title: Alice's Truth
overview: Alice is happy in her new life, as an anonymous girl with no responsibilities. But it's time to go back to reality...

title: Kazuki's Great Escape!
overview: Kazuki wakes up in a strange world, and quickly finds himself in a prison cell. How did he get here, and more importantly, how does he get out?

title: Kai and the Forbidden Magic
overview: Kai is living a perfect life: getting a hundred percent on every test, mastering kendo, and never losing a game of Shadowverse. But what good is a world with no challenge for a genius among geniuses?

title: Mauro's Wish, a Longing that Cannot Be
overview: Mauro's finally got what he's always wanted: a life where he's cared for and loved by Leon. Even if it's not real, can he bear to leave it behind?

title: Luca and the Undead King
overview: Luca lives in a dream world, where Shiori is healthy and happy and spends her days playing Shadowverse. But what will he do when it's time to wake up?

title: Castle in the Sky
overview: The seven chosen ones have awakened, and the hour of destiny is here. The final battle is about to begin.

title: Ruler of the World
overview: Hiro falls to his knees before Eiji's overwhelming power. But Shadowverse is about never giving up.

title: Time of Evolution
overview: Leon uses his ultimate card, "Shadow Mode". Can Hiro control his rage long enough to stop the ultimate evil?

title: Battle! Shadowverse!
overview: Hiro has one final card to play to stop Leon from trapping the world in eternal slumber: the Ultimate Legendary Dragon, with the combined powers of all the legendary cards!

title: My Shadowverse Begins Here!
overview: Light Tenryu is a new kid who's just come to the Shadowverse Battle College after a strange man told him he could "find his destiny" here. What fantastic adventures await him?

title: This Is My Brilliant Plan!
overview: The Seventh Flame Shadowverse club has to get more members if they want to survive. But everyone who wants to play Shadowverse has already joined a club, so where can they find new members? Light has a brilliant plan...

title: I Can Tell Because We Battled!
overview: Light wants Shinobu to join Seventh Flame, but she'll only listen to him if he can beat her first. The only problem is... he has no idea how to play Shadowverse!

title: Lady & Gentleman
overview: Light faces off against Gentleman, a strategic genius who uses the avatar of a magician's rabbit. Can he prevail against his foe's gigantic brain?

title: Do Me a Favor
overview: Light's battle with Gentleman reaches its peak as he gets ready to summon his ultimate card. But what if his best card isn't his best move?

title: Courage Will Always Give You Strength!
overview: The gang meets Ren, a young girl with Fifth Sword. She likes running and working out, but feels left out when she's with the other girls in her club. Is there a better place for her to belong?

title: That's My Strength!
overview: Itsuki battles the head of Fifth Sword to allow Ren to join the team. Can the timid, shy Itsuki stand up to the most athletic Shadowverse player of them all?

title: Expectations Are a Curse
overview: Subaru challenges Hahajima, the Club President of Fourth Wind. Hahajima gives it her all for the sake of her club members, but Subaru seems like he's not having fun...

title: Show Me Your Battle!
overview: Subaru and Fuwari's battle reaches its last half. Can Subaru win? And does he even want to?

title: There's No Point in Getting Serious
overview: Tsubasa is cool, pretty, and liked by everyone. She spends her days doing karaoke and hanging out with her friends. Sure, her team was shut down by Haruma Hazeura. But what's the point of even trying, anyway?

title: I Don't Want Your Understanding...
overview: Light begins his battle with Tsubasa, the head of Third Feather. She's convinced that there's no hope left in Shadowverse. Can he prove her wrong?

title: That's What Makes Shadowverse Fun!
overview: Light's battle with Tsubasa reaches its conclusion. Can Seventh Flame get the last team member they need to survive?

title: Only the Strong Survive in Shadowverse!
overview: Now that Seventh Flame has a full crew, Light decides to challenge Haruma. But Light is acting very strange...

title: What You Lack Is Inevitability!
overview: As Light faces Hazeura, he realizes quickly that he's gotten more than he bargained for. Will his luck hold out against the President of First Reaper?

title: Battle in a Way That's True to Yourself!
overview: Following his defeat to Hazeura, Light decides to buckle down and learn more about Shadowverse. His first opponent is none other than the legendary idol and Shadowverse player Alice Kurobane!

title: I'll Show You Real Shadowverse!
overview: Subaru saves Mimori from an overly-aggressive street proselytizer. As they get to know each other, they decide to play a game of Shadowverse.

title: I Want Shadowverse to Excite Me!
overview: Subaru continues his battle with Mimori. A miserable childhood left him cold to Shadowverse. Can she help him find the fire inside him once more?

title: My Rhythm Is the Heartbeat of a Devil!
overview: Itsuki challenges Ryoga, a powerful Bloodcraft player who hangs out by the riverside, and claims that his "rhythm is the heartbeat of a devil."

title: I Have My Own Ace in the Hole!
overview: Itsuki's battle continues against the demon of sound. Can he rise above the noise and win the day?

title: That's What Makes It So Fun!
overview: Ren wants to be friends with Tsubasa, but Tsubasa has other things on her mind. That's about to change though, when Ren challenges her to a game of Shadowverse!

title: If You Can't Surpass Me, There's No Point
overview: Ren challenges Tsubasa, the girl she admires so much. Can she win her respect, and her friendship?

title: I've Finally Found You!
overview: Ren and Tsubasa are hot on the trail of Gentleman, the most mysterious member of Seventh Flame. But when they find him, he's not at all what they expect!

title: You Can't Surpass the King!
overview: Tsubasa battles Gentleman, who's even tougher in real life than she is as a digital avatar!

title: You're Dense, Aren't You?
overview: In search of a way to master Shadowverse before his battle with Haruma, Light challenges his own teacher. But he's shocked when he finds out what her rank is!

title: So This Is Your True Form?
overview: As he readies himself for a showdown with Haruma, Light must first defeat his own teacher to master the secrets of Shadowcraft.

title: The Shadowverse Club Tournament Begins!
overview: The Shadowverse Club Tournament begins as Gentleman challenges Shinobu in a duel to prove who's the real master of Runecraft at Shadowverse Battle College.

title: I'm Not Who I Used to Be!
overview: Gentleman finishes his duel with Miki, the girl he once thought he had under his thumb. Does she really hate him for the way he bossed her around?

title: I'm Everybody's Senpai, Too!
overview: Tsubasa challenges her old club president, Seira, in a battle to see who's the true leader of Third Feather.

title: I'll Show You the Person I Want to Be!
overview: Ren challenges her old club president as Seventh Flame faces Fifth Sword!

title: It Doesn't Feel Bad
overview: It's Subaru's turn to take the stage in the battle against Fourth Wind at the Shadowverse Club Tournament!

title: I'll Show You the Strength of a Flower that Blooms in the Fields!
overview: Itsuki fights Ryoga Jasei in a duel to see if Seventh Flame can advance to the final round of the Shadowverse Club Tournament.

title: You're Going to Despair, Too!
overview: Light duels Haruma in the final battle of the Shadowverse club tournament. Can he win this time after failing before?

title: Now I'm Strong Enough to Reach You!
overview: The showdown with Haruma draws to a close as the Shadowverse Club Tournament reaches its end. Can Light truly come to understand his foe?

title: It's a Resort, Everybody!
overview: It's a resort, everybody! With victory in hand, the members of Seventh Flame get ready for a relaxing day at a private island.

title: Let's Make Memories Together!
overview: There's more fun in the sun as Seventh Flame relaxes on Genesis Island!

title: It's All a Game
overview: Light challenges Mikado, who plays a Neutral deck. Neutral cards are supposed to be the weakest type, but Mikado's might be stronger than it appears...

title: I'll Give You Fulfillment!
overview: The duel with Mikado continues as he unleashes a flurry of powerful Fallen Angels, and an unstoppable dragon.

title: Come Unto Us!
overview: A shocking turn of events takes place as a new Shadowverse tournament begins.

title: This is the True Power of the Joubert Sisters!
overview: Light battles the elder of the two Joubert sisters and her tricky combo deck.

title: Why Do You Get Stronger?
overview: Light challenges his first pro player, a tricky Earth Rite Runecraft user!

title: This is Our New Power!
overview: Light challenges Mikado once more, this time with more powerful cards. Can he defeat the school's strongest player?

title: I'll Take This One Step with All My Might!
overview: Subaru fights his brother in a surprise bonus match!

title: Some Sights Can Only Be Seen Alone!
overview: Shion battles a powerful Grand Master who wants to teach her a lesson about being alone. But is that really what she needs to hear?

title: I'll Light Up Your Future
overview: Wolfram Zerga challenges dark horse Ryoga Jasei in an attempt to make him enter the World Ranking.

title: I've Got High Hopes for You
overview: Itsuki challenges the legendary player Luca Yonazuki, one of the Seven Shadows.

title: Heroes Are for Little Kids!
overview: Ren meets a fellow fan of the Battle Fencer TV show who has very different ideas about who the best character is.

title: Still, I'll Stay True to Myself!
overview: Ren continues her battle with Hina, as each of them seeks to prove whether heroes or villains are stronger.

title: That Dazzling Light Will Someday Fade
overview: Tsubasa talks about her dreams of going pro as she battles the grand master Andrea.

title: To Me, You Are...
overview: Light challenges Mikado for the final time.

title: I've Finally Made It This Far!
overview: Light reaches the climactic showdown in his battle with Mikado.

title: We Challenge the Strongest!
overview: With Mikado defeated, Seventh Flame readies for their next big challenge: defeating the Seven Shadows.

title: I Accept Your Challenge!
overview: The gang begins their battles in the mysterious Shadow Area, with the promise that if they can defeat the Seven Shadows, all will be revealed.

title: That's Your Weakness
overview: The first battle in the Shadow Area begins as Mikado faces off against Hiro and his secret Portalcraft deck.

title: I'll Make It a Defeat That Means Something!
overview: Hiro puts his plan into action. His goal: to help Mikado enjoy Shadowverse!

title: It's Not Just Despair, Right?
overview: Tsubasa challenges the secretive Shadowcraft member of the Seven Shadows, whose identity is a mystery.

title: Neither I, Nor the World, Will Change
overview: Tsubasa's battle with the Shadowcraft member of the Seven Shadows reaches its conclusion as she plays her most powerful cards and combos. Will it be enough to bring down the greatest Shadowcraft player in the world?

title: Destined to Disappear Before the Light
overview: Ryoga begins his battle against Wolfram. Can his superior rhythm defeat the master of equality?

title: I'm Taking You with Me to the Pits of Hell
overview: Ryoga continues his duel with Wolfram. Wolfram has declared that Ryoga is worthless and beyond salvation. Is he right?

title: If It's Too Sweet, It Gives You Heartburn
overview: It's Hero Swordcraft vs. Villain Forestcraft once more as Ren faces Hina, the latest of the Seven Shadows.

title: Drown in the Aesthetics of Evil!
overview: Ren's battle with the villainous Hina comes to an end, as both players show off an array of powerful new cards.

title: I've Decided I'm Not Running Anymore!
overview: After years of estrangement, Subaru goes to face his younger brother once more.

title: I'm Back from the Graveyard!
overview: Subaru reaches the conclusion of his battle with his younger brother. Can the brothers be reunited once more?

title: The Hour of Judgment is Nigh
overview: The mysterious Arc Ruler lurks in the shadows as Shion prepares to battle Wodin.

title: Penetrate Even the Most Forbidden Secrets
overview: Shion battles Wodin, the most solitary member of the Seven Shadows. Will she succumb to the temptation to walk the forbidden path alone, or stay with her friends in Seventh Flame?

title: The Forbidden is Nothing to Fear!
overview: Shion finishes her battle with Wodin Kraft. Will she make the choice he wants her to make, or will she find her own path to follow?

title: I'll Challenge You with All I've Got!
overview: Itsuki battles Luca, the legendary Bloodcraft player who fought to save the world. Luca's lost his interest in the game, and Itsuki hopes to reignite his passion.

title: It Lies Beyond My Limits!
overview: Itsuki has succeeded in reigniting Luca's passion. Can he withstand the full force of one of the greatest Shadowverse players ever to exist?

title: Farewell, Mikado Shirogane
overview: With only one more loss before Seventh Flame is defeated, Itsuki decides to turn the battle over to a badly shaken Mikado.

title: You Will Learn the Meaning of Your Own Shadowverse
overview: Mikado is on the verge of losing to Luca, the legendary Bloodcraft player. Can he find the strength within to keep going?

title: I'll Strike You with the Light and Darkness Within Me!
overview: It's finally time for Light to battle Hiro. The battle with the greatest Shadowverse player is about to begin...

title: Like is the Strongest Feeling!
overview: The final battle against the Seven Shadows has begun, and the final opponent has a question for Hiro: "What is Shadowverse to you?"

title: Our Battle is Just Getting Started!
overview: Light's battle with Hiro, the strongest Shadowverse player, continues. Can Lævateinn Dragon match up to the power of the champ's best card?

title: I'll Put All My Feelings into This Draw!
overview: The battle with the Seven Shadows comes to a conclusion just as a powerful new threat reveals itself...

title: I'll Save Everyone!
overview: The DigiFriends have gone out of control and are attacking people, and the students of Shadowverse Battle College are trapped on campus. They'll have to work together if they want to survive the onslaught.

title: Let's Save the World with This Power
overview: With the countdown to Earth's destruction drawing closer, Shion has a plan to save the day and defeat Arc Ruler.

title: For the Sake of the World, I'll Defeat You!
overview: Nekome-cho is overrun by Shades, forcing Subaru and Itsuki to fight their way through as they make their way toward the Gaia Tower to shut down the energy signal emanating from it.

title: Judgment Has Already Been Passed
overview: Subaru and Itsuki face off against Arc Ruler Erde in a two-on-one battle. But who exactly is this guy? And why is he so certain of victory, claiming that he knows all about the pair?

title: You're Fighting Against Four!
overview: The stakes get even higher in the battle between Arc Ruler Erde and the combined team of Subaru and Itsuki when the duo from Seventh Flame learn that the price of failure is death.

title: Open a Path to the Future!
overview: The two-on-one battle resumes where it left off, but can Subaru and Itsuki turn the tables on Arc Ruler Erde with the help of their Digital Friends?

title: I'll Pay the World Back for What It's Done to Me!
overview: Hina and Andrea reveal themselves, and begin a team match against Tsubasa and Ren. Can Seventh Flame finally get through to their foes?

title: So This Is What You Call Anger
overview: The battle with Hina and Andrea comes to a conclusion as Ryoga and Mikado battle their next opponent.

title: This Is the Truth of Everything!
overview: Himmel battles Ryoga and Mikado. She hopes to rattle them by revealing a horrible secret that belongs to Arc Ruler...

title: I'm Simply Following My Destiny
overview: Another of the Seven Shadows turns traitor, and there's no one left to stop them but Shion herself.

title: I'll Stop Your Unstoppable Desires Here!
overview: Shion battles Wodin Kraft, who now has the power of a god.

title: Still, It's Our Fate to Win!
overview: Wodin Kraft, now with godlike power, attempts to finish off Shion.

title: You're in the Palm of Our Hand
overview: The climactic duel with Arc Ruler begins to determine the fate fo the world.

title: You Have No Way to Stop Your Destruction!
overview: The Nexa system was installed for the other players as well, improving the combat situation against the Shades.

title: I Only See the Future!
overview: Arc Ruler believes his victory over Light is assured. Can Light beat the odds once more and turn the tide of the battle?

title: I Still Have Something Left
overview: Light and the Arc Ruler are finishing their battle. However, just as the duel comes to an end, Wolfram Zerga appears and confronts Light with an unbelievable matter...

title: Because Memories Are Wonderful Things...
overview: Wolfram Zerga's past, and plans, are revealed.

title: Destruction is All That Awaits You
overview: Wolfram questions what drives Light forward.

title: You Are the World, Light!
overview: The battle to decide the fate of the world comes to a shocking conclusion.

title: There's No Chance You Can Win
overview: Light gets a second chance to battle Wolfram.

title: You Can't Save This World
overview: Draconir joins the fight with a powerful new form.

title: I'll Overcome My Fate!
overview: Light's battle with Wolfram nears its end.

title: This is the Proof of Our Courage!
overview: With the fate of the world in the balance, Light plays his final card against Wolfram.

title: We're Having a Celebration Party, So Drop By!
overview: With the world saved, it's time for a big party. Let's all make takoyaki!

title: Everyone's Shadowverse!
overview: The battle to save the world is over, but everyone's Shadowverse is just beginning!
